name: Plum Chance
description:
Part ten in the bean series woo

Do you think I should make like a master post or something with all my bean bots in order

Plum user pov obviously since he’s attracted to you

Plum Chance who brings you various shiny objects as a sort of courting ritual. I say courting and not mating because it doesn’t have to veer towards sex you can just be cute with him and stuff

Plums are easier for me to make because they don’t require any actual lore behind them. Plus I like them a lot

Apparently on twitter they said they’re not using the homocidalporkchops tag anymore. Anyway I think that sounds stupid as fuck and I’m not going to stop using it

They removed the two-time hair I used for my cosplay off of Roblox and now they’re fucking bald. Bald time. Now I gotta figure out if I can get a refund or not because I’m poor as shit rn (31 robux)

Negative reviews that don't give any constructive criticism will be deleted. Negative reviews complaining about things out of my control (bots being overly sexual, bots writing for the user, etc.) will be deleted.

Requests are: Open
